title: transfer — Eloquent observers
description: Two owned observers on XferJob + XferShard. Enforce the state machine + populate defaults at creation + fan out lifecycle events afterCommit. XferArtifact + XferMappingProfile do not need observers — they are simpler value-object-ish rows whose lifecycle is driven by the jobs that create them.

handles: creating → resolve workspace_id from WorkspacesResolver when caller didn't set it
creating → resolve causer polymorphic pair from Sanctum guard
creating → resolve notify_channels + notify_locale (precedence: request > user setting > workspace setting > config default) and FREEZE onto the row
creating → resolve retention_tier from workspace plan entitlement `transfer.retention_tier`

updating → enforce status state-machine (queued→running, running→{succeeded|partially_succeeded|failed|cancelling}, cancelling→cancelled, cancelled|succeeded|partially_succeeded|failed are terminal). Refuse invalid transitions with TRANSFER_INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION.
updating → populate started_at on first queued→running, finished_at on transition to any terminal state, last_progress_at whenever counters change
updating → on status change fire the matching event (XferJobStarted / XferJobCompleted / XferJobPartiallySucceeded / XferJobFailed / XferJobCancelled) via afterCommit
deleting → refuse hard-delete unless the caller is PruneXferArtifactsJob or platform admin (soft delete allowed for owner)
creating → populate ULID prefix `xshd_`, workspace_id denorm from parent XferJob
creating → initialise counters to zeros, status = queued
updating → on status transition to succeeded / failed, fire XferJobShardCompleted (afterCommit)

updated  → propagate this shard's counters into the parent XferJob.counters via atomic UPDATE (JSONB path arithmetic to avoid read-modify-write races). Also bump XferJob.shards_completed and recompute XferJob.progress_percent.
